title: subworkflow - aws configure aws package
description:
Subworkflow to install, update, or uninstall AWS packages on EC2 instances

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) EC2 instance ID
action: (Required) Install, Update, or Uninstall
packageName: (Required) Package name (e.g., AmazonCloudWatchAgent, awscli)
version: (Optional) Package version
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) AWS OIDC connection

Waits for package installation to complete
guide:
## 📦 **Configure AWS Package**

Installs/updates AWS packages via SSM.
